task.desc: Add *.tmp and *.swp to .gitignore to prevent editor temp files from being committed

l1.content: {"edit_description":"Add .tmp and .swp to .gitignore","target_files":[".gitignore"],"patch_commands":["sed -i '/^\\*\\.[a-z]*$/a\\t\\.tmp\\n\\t\\.swp\\n\\t.gitignore' .gitignore"],"validation_commands":["grep -q '.tmp' .gitignore && grep -q '.swp' .gitignore"],"expected_outcome":"Remove .tmp and .swp from .gitignore","risk_notes":"Potential security risk if temp files are committed","follow_up_type":"none|needs_review"}

parsed.risk_notes: Potential security risk if temp files are committed
